resources.string: This is the default native Android app page. It means the APK was installed and launched successfully. It is not an \"Application not found\" error.
The current Android code includes only this basic home screen/demo page. Business features like login, ledger, customer forms, payments, and database storage still need to be developed.

1. Login screen
2. Dashboard
3. Add customer
4. Add credit/debit entry
5. View ledger
6. Local database storage
For testing, this APK is working correctly. The next step is to develop the app features.
